calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Attorney Fees And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'s unopposed Motion For Attorney Fees is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, Plaintiff's motion for attorney's fees is granted. Defendant Elizabeth S. Prost shall pay Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'s reasonable attorney's fees incurred in this action in an amount of $800, and the judgment shall be amended nunc pro tunc to include this amount.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed summary judgment motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
